zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess of France Marguerite Capet於1157年11月出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，她的父親Louis VII le Jeune roi de France38歲，母親Constance de Castile17歲。她於1173年11月2日與Henry, the Young King of England在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾布格結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1197年9月18日在羅曼 艾皮爾加利利享年39歲，埋葬在敘利亞馬可 素瓦a也泰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess of France Marguerite Capet于1157年11月出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，她的父亲Louis VII le Jeune roi de France38岁，母亲Constance de Castile17岁。她于1173年11月2日与Henry, the Young King of England在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾布格结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1197年9月18日在羅曼 艾皮爾加利利享年39岁，埋葬在叙利亚馬可 素瓦a也泰。

nameMeanings.name: Capet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: regional variant of Chapel , from a dialect diminutive of Old French chape ‘hooded cloak, cape, hood’, or ‘hat’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of cloaks or hats, or a nickname for a habitual wearer of a distinctive cloak or hat.
Catalan: old variant or Castilianized form of   Capell   ‘hat, hood’, a cognate of 2 above.

variants.name: Capell
meanings: English: variant of Chappell ‘chapel’, from a Norman form with hard c-, applied as a topographic or occupational name, or as a habitational name for someone from any of several minor places called with this word, such as Capel in Surrey, Capel le Ferne in Kent, or Capel Saint Andrew and Capel Saint Mary in Suffolk.

English: from Middle English capel, caple, capul(le) ‘stallion, gelding; warhorse, cart horse, riding horse’, denoting someone thought to resemble a horse in some way or possibly someone whose occupation involved horses.
Catalan: from capell ‘hat, hood’, as a nickname for someone who habitually wore a hat or hood, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who made hats or hoods.

variants.name: Capeles
meanings: Hispanic (Puerto Rico): probably the plural form of Catalan   Capel  .

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Princess of France Marguerite Capet was born in November 1157, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, her father, Louis VII le Jeune roi de France, was 38 and her mother, Constance de Castile, was 17. She married Henry, the Young King of England on 2 November 1173, in Neubourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 18 September 1197, in Galilee, Roman Empire, at the age of 39, and was buried in Tyre, As Suwaydā', Syria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess of France Marguerite Capet est née en novembre 1157, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, Louis VII le Jeune roi de France, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Constance de Castile, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Henry, the Young King of England le 2 novembre 1173, à Neubourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 septembre 1197, à Galilee, Roman Empire, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Tyre, As Suwaydā', Syrie.

de.Ile de la Cité, Paris, Ile-de-France, Fr: Île de la Cité, Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Princess of France Marguerite Capet im November 1157 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis VII le Jeune roi de France 38 und ihre Mutter Constance de Castile 17. Sie hat am 2. November 1173 in Neubourg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich Henry, the Young King of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 18. September 1197 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Galilee, Roman Empire und wurde in Tyre, As Suwaydā', Syrien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess of France Marguerite Capet è nata il nel novembre 1157 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Louis VII le Jeune roi de France, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Constance de Castile, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Henry, the Young King of England il 2 novembre 1173, nel Neubourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 18 settembre 1197, nel Galilee, Roman Empire, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Tyre, As Suwaydā', Siria.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess of France Marguerite Capetが1157年11月にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父Louis VII le Jeune roi de Franceは38歳，母Constance de Castileは17歳であった。1173年11月2日にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンネウボウルグでHenry, the Young King of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1197年9月18日にロマン エンパアーガリリーで39歳で死去し，シリアアス スワイドa'トイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Ile de la Cité, Paris, Ile-de-France, Fr: 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스 i일 데 라 시트e
ko.lifeSummary: Princess of France Marguerite Capet(이)가 1157년 11월 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis VII le Jeune roi de France(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance de Castile(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1173년 11월 2일 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 니우보우르그에서 Henry, the Young King of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 9월 18일 로먼 피르 갈라일리에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 시리아 아스 수웨이드a' 타이어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess of France Marguerite Capet nasceu em novembro de 1157, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Louis VII le Jeune roi de France, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Castile, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry, the Young King of England em 2 de novembro de 1173, em Neubourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1197, em Galilee, Roman Empire, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Tyre, As Suwaydā', Síria.

ru.Ile de la Cité, Paris, Ile-de-France, Fr: iл де ла ситe, пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess of France Marguerite Capet родилась ноябрь 1157 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Louis VII le Jeune roi de France было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de Castile, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry, the Young King of England 2 ноября 1173 г. в местности неубург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 18 сентября 1197 г. в местности галили, роман эмпир в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности тир, ас сувеидa', Сирия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess of France Marguerite Capet nació en noviembre de 1157, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Louis VII le Jeune roi de France, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Constance de Castile, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Henry, the Young King of England el 2 de noviembre de 1173, en Neubourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1197, en Galilee, Roman Empire, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Tyre, As Suwaydā', Siria.
